All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    AttachmentDAOImpl
    AttachmentDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Attachment entity.
    AttachmentDAOInt
    AttachmentDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Attachment entity.
    AttachmentDTO
    AttachmentDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for managing file attachments.
    AttachmentServiceImpl
    AttachmentServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Attachment entity.
    AttachmentServiceInt
    AttachmentServiceInt is the service interface for the Attachment entity.
    BaseCtl<F extends BaseForm,​T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>>
    Base Controller class that provides common CRUD operations for all controllers.
    BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
    Base Data Access Object implementation that provides common CRUD operations and search functionality for all entities.
    BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Base Data Access Object interface that defines standard CRUD operations and search functionality for all entities.
    BaseDTO
    Base Data Transfer Object class that provides common fields and functionality for all DTOs in the application.
    BaseForm
    Base Form class that serves as a superclass for all form objects in the application.
    BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,​D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
    Base Service Implementation class that provides common business logic and transactional operations for all services in the application.
    BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Base Service Interface that defines standard business operations for all services in the application.
    ChangePasswordForm
    ChangePasswordForm is a form class used for capturing password change requests.
    CollegeCtl
    CollegeCtl is the controller class for managing college-related operations.
    CollegeDAOImpl
    CollegeDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the College entity.
    CollegeDAOInt
    CollegeDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the College entity.
    CollegeDTO
    CollegeDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the College entity.
    CollegeForm
    CollegeForm is a form class used for capturing college-related data.
    CollegeServiceImpl
    CollegeServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the College entity.
    CollegeServiceInt
    CollegeServiceInt is the service interface for the College entity.

    ContactCtl is the controller class for managing contact-related operations.

    ContactDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Contact entity.
    ContactDAOInt
    ContactDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Contact entity.
    ContactDTO
    ContactDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Contact entity.
    ContactForm
    ContactForm is a form class used for capturing contact inquiry data.
    ContactServiceImpl
    ContactServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Contact entity.
    ContactServiceInt
    ContactServiceInt is the service interface for the Contact entity.
    CourseCtl
    CourseCtl is the controller class for managing course-related operations.
    CourseDAOImpl
    CourseDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Course entity.
    CourseDAOInt
    CourseDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Course entity.
    CourseDTO
    CourseDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Course entity.
    CourseForm
    CourseForm is a form class used for capturing course-related data.
    CourseServiceImpl
    CourseServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Course entity.
    CourseServiceInt
    CourseServiceInt is the service interface for the Course entity.
    DatabaseException
    DatabaseException is a custom runtime exception that is thrown when database-related errors occur during application execution.
    DropdownList
    Dropdown List Interface that provides a contract for objects that can be displayed as options in dropdown lists.
    DuplicateRecordException
    DuplicateRecordException is a custom runtime exception that is thrown when an attempt is made to insert or update a record that violates a unique constraint in the database.
    EmailBuilder
    EmailBuilder is a utility class that constructs HTML email messages for various user-related notifications.
    EmailCtl
    EmailCtl is the controller class for handling email-related operations.
    EmailMessage
    EmailMessage is a POJO (Plain Old Java Object) class that encapsulates email message details for sending emails through the email service.
    EmailServiceImpl
    EmailServiceImpl is the service implementation class for sending emails.
    EmailServiceInt
    EmailServiceInt is the service interface for sending emails.
    EmailUtility
    EmailUtility is a utility class for email-related operations.
    FacultyCtl
    FacultyCtl is the controller class for managing faculty-related operations.
    FacultyDAOImpl
    FacultyDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Faculty entity.
    FacultyDAOInt
    FacultyDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Faculty entity.
    FacultyDTO
    FacultyDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Faculty entity.
    FacultyForm
    FacultyForm is a form class used for capturing faculty-related data.
    FacultyServiceImpl
    FacultyServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Faculty entity.
    FacultyServiceInt
    FacultyServiceInt is the service interface for the Faculty entity.
    ForgetPasswordForm
    ForgetPasswordForm is a form class used for capturing forgot password requests.
    JasperCtl
    JasperCtl is the controller class for generating Jasper reports.
    JWTRequestFilter
    JWTRequestFilter is a custom filter that intercepts incoming HTTP requests to validate JWT tokens.
    JWTUserDetailsService
    JWTUserDetailsService is a service class that implements Spring Security's UserDetailsService interface for JWT authentication.
    JWTUtil
    JWTUtil is a utility class for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
    LoginCtl
    LoginCtl is the controller class for handling authentication operations.
    LoginForm
    LoginForm is a form class used for capturing user login credentials.
    MarksheetCtl
    MarksheetCtl is the controller class for managing marksheet-related operations.

    MarksheetForm

    MarksheetServiceImpl
    MarksheetServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Marksheet entity.

    College Service interface.
    MyProfileForm
    MyProfileForm is a form class used for capturing user profile data.

    ORSResponse class represents the standard response object for API endpoints.

    UserContext
    UserContext class holds the current user's session information.
    UserContextHolder
    UserContextHolder class provides a thread-local storage mechanism for managing UserContext objects.

    UserCtl is the controller class for managing user-related operations.
